scripts.ops:alert:verify: docker compose --env-file .env --env-file .env.production -f docker-compose.prod.yml run --rm --no-deps ops-sentinel send-test
scripts.ops:backup: docker compose --env-file .env --env-file .env.production -f docker-compose.prod.yml run --rm backup once
scripts.ops:backup:verify: docker compose --env-file .env --env-file .env.production -f docker-compose.prod.yml --profile ops run --rm backup-verify
scripts.ops:backup:replica:init: docker compose --env-file .env --env-file .env.production -f docker-compose.prod.yml --profile offsite-backup run --rm backup-replica replica-init
scripts.ops:backup:replica: docker compose --env-file .env --env-file .env.production -f docker-compose.prod.yml --profile offsite-backup run --rm backup-replica replica-once
scripts.ops:backup:replica:verify: docker compose --env-file .env --env-file .env.production -f docker-compose.prod.yml --profile offsite-backup-ops run --rm backup-replica-verify
